summary: Tested Working Professional Profile View/Edit Mode (iteration 28). Frontend fully working after fixing 2 blocking parse errors (corrupted trailing chars in profile.tsx + duplicate exports in constants.ts). UI flows all PASS: fresh-pro starts in edit mode, save flips to view mode with Edit Profile button, tap Edit re-opens edit mode, Cancel restores snapshot + flips to view, gender/education pickers render, phone-verify button only visible in edit mode, default avatar Ionicons person shows when no photo. Backend has TWO bugs: (a) gender + education NOT persisted by PUT /api/profile for professionals because PRO_PROFILE_FIELDS list (server.py:1143-1146) is missing both keys; ProfileBody accepts them but the update_profile route only copies keys listed in PRO_PROFILE_FIELDS. (b) pro_missing_fields() (server.py:1179-1180) still appends 'Profile Photo' to missing list, contradicting spec note that backend already treats photo as optional.

critical.issue: gender and education are accepted by ProfileBody but DROPPED on save because PRO_PROFILE_FIELDS list at server.py:1143-1146 does not include 'gender' or 'education'. Fix: add them to PRO_PROFILE_FIELDS (and 'education_details' for the __OTHER__ flow).

missing_fields still contains 'Profile Photo' even though spec states backend should treat photo as OPTIONAL (no pro_missing_fields entry). Source: server.py:1179-1180 in pro_missing_fields(). Fix: remove the 'Profile Photo' append block; also reduce the divisor in compute_pro_profile_completion (server.py:1152) from 10 to 9 so completion still reaches 100% for fully filled profiles.

fixes_applied_by_testing_agent.issue: Trailing garbage lines 610-611 ('rginBottom: 10 },\n});') causing Babel SyntaxError -> Metro bundling failed -> frontend served 500 on all routes.
EDUCATION_OPTIONS and GENDER_OPTIONS were declared TWICE (lines 17-27 + lines 132-141), producing 'Multiple exports of name' compile errors.
fixes_applied_by_testing_agent.fix: Removed the older legacy definitions (B.Tech-style education + duplicate gender). Kept the spec-aligned versions (High School/Diploma/Bachelor's/Master's/PhD/Other and male/female/other/prefer_not_to_say).

failed_tests: test_pro_missing_fields_excludes_photo - 'Profile Photo' still in missing list

frontend_test_results.fresh_mode: PASS - Save Profile button visible, Edit Profile button hidden, phone-otp button visible, name input editable, gender+education pickers render, default avatar (Ionicons person on purple circle) shown
frontend_test_results.view_mode_after_save: PASS - Edit Profile button visible, Save/Cancel hidden, phone-otp hidden, name input readonly, profile completion 90% (because backend still flags Profile Photo)
frontend_test_results.tap_edit_profile: PASS - Save Changes + Cancel + phone-otp buttons appear, inputs become editable
frontend_test_results.tap_cancel: PASS - Snapshot restored, returns to view mode, Edit Profile button visible again
frontend_test_results.default_avatar: PASS - Ionicons person icon on purple circle renders when no photoB64; camera badge only shown in edit mode
frontend_test_results.phone_verify_gate: PASS - Verify Mobile Number button only renders when editMode=true

action_items: Backend: add 'gender', 'education', 'education_details' to PRO_PROFILE_FIELDS list in /app/backend/server.py:1143.

Backend: remove the 'Profile Photo' branch from pro_missing_fields() (server.py:1179-1180) and update compute_pro_profile_completion divisor from 10 to 9 (server.py:1152) so a fully filled profile (without photo) reads 100%.
Optional: convert the legacy duplicate constants cleanup into a guard (e.g. eslint no-redeclare in CI) so future merges can't reintroduce the duplicate export bug that broke the build.
critical_code_review_comments: profile.tsx is 609 lines - close to the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting Phone-OTP modal and Gmail-OTP modal into separate components.

PRO_PROFILE_FIELDS is the single source of truth for which keys get persisted in PUT /profile; any new ProfileBody field added for pros must be mirrored here, otherwise it silently drops. Worth a code comment.
compute_pro_profile_completion uses hardcoded divisor 10; this is brittle when missing_fields contents change.
seed_data_creation: None - tests create their own throwaway pro accounts via /api/auth/signup using @acmecorp.io domain.
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent adds 'gender'/'education'/'education_details' to PRO_PROFILE_FIELDS and removes Profile Photo from pro_missing_fields, re-run /app/backend/tests/test_iteration28_pro_profile_view_edit.py - all 4 tests should pass. Frontend UI flow is fully verified.
rca_of_issue: Two bugs found by automated regression: (1) ProfileBody declares gender + education at server.py:442-443, but the PUT /profile handler at server.py:1475-1477 only copies keys listed in role-specific allow-lists (PRO_PROFILE_FIELDS for professionals at line 1143). That list omits gender + education, so they get filtered out silently and Mongo never receives the update. Confirmed by GET /api/auth/me returning a profile dict with no 'gender'/'education' keys after a successful PUT. (2) pro_missing_fields at server.py:1179-1180 still appends 'Profile Photo'; review_request states spec moved photo to optional (client mandatory list updated accordingly) but backend was never updated.
